# Vitality Family Chiropractic — Arlington TX

> Vitality Family Chiropractic is a corrective chiropractic clinic in Arlington, Texas serving families, pregnant mothers, children, and athletes. Affiliated with MaxLiving. Se Habla Espanol.

## Business Information

- Name: Vitality Family Chiropractic
- Address: 1106 W. Pioneer Parkway, Suite 300, Arlington, TX 76013
- Phone: (817) 962-0182
- Website: https://vitalitychiroarlington.com
- New Patient Special: $149 exam includes consultation, X-rays, nerve scan, and first adjustment
- Languages: English, Spanish (Se Habla Espanol)
- Affiliation: MaxLiving Health Center

## Doctors

- Dr. Elise Hernandez, DC — Founder. Specializes in prenatal and pediatric chiropractic care.
- Dr. Mary Davis, DC — Specializes in prenatal and pediatric chiropractic care.
- Dr. Chad London, DC, CCSP — Certified Chiropractic Sports Physician. Specializes in sports chiropractic.

## Staff

- Katy Moore — Nutrition
- Brooke Strunk — Practice Manager
- Ashley Jackson — Chiropractic Assistant (CA)

## Services

- Chiropractic Adjustments: https://vitalitychiroarlington.com/chiropractic-adjustments-arlington-tx
- Prenatal Chiropractic: https://vitalitychiroarlington.com/prenatal-chiropractic-arlington-tx
- Pediatric Chiropractic: https://vitalitychiroarlington.com/pediatric-chiropractor-arlington-tx
- Sports Chiropractic: https://vitalitychiroarlington.com/sports-chiropractor-arlington-tx
- Advanced Spinal Correction: https://vitalitychiroarlington.com/advanced-spinal-correction-arlington-tx
- Family Chiropractic: https://vitalitychiroarlington.com/family-chiropractic-arlington-tx
- MaxLiving 5 Essentials: https://vitalitychiroarlington.com/maxliving-5-essentials-arlington-tx
- sEMG Nerve Scan (diagnostic)
- Spinal X-rays (diagnostic)
- Orthopedic Testing (diagnostic)
- Metabolix Testing (nutrition/metabolic)

## Conditions Treated

- Back Pain: https://vitalitychiroarlington.com/back-pain-treatment-arlington-tx
- Neck Pain: https://vitalitychiroarlington.com/neck-pain-treatment-arlington-tx

- Herniated Discs: https://vitalitychiroarlington.com/herniated-disc-treatment-arlington-tx
- Auto Accident Injuries: https://vitalitychiroarlington.com/auto-accident-chiropractor-arlington-tx
